mbmEbomMbomNotLinked: “{0}” cannot be opened for EBOM-MBOM alignment because it does not contain an EBOM and a MBOM that are linked to each other. Please use the rich client to add and link an EBOM and a MBOM.

mbmRemoveMultipleConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove these {0} objects?

mbmCnPopupSubHeaderTitle: Showing Work Packages impacted by the engineering change notice
mbmCnNotAssocitedTooltipDescription: "{0}" is not associated with this work package. To have the change notice track your changes, please associate it.
mbmReadOnlyChipTooltipDescription: You cannot write to the change notice. Therefore you will not be able to associate work packages to it.
missingEbomDesc: The part is no longer included in the EBOM.
assignedDesc: The part is assigned to the MBOM.
multipleAssignedDesc: The part is assigned to the MBOM multiple times.
containsMismatchesMbomDesc: Contains assignments that either have different revisions in the EBOM or are missing completely.
missingDesc: The part is no longer included in the EBOM.
containsMismatchesEbomDesc: Contains parts that are assigned to the MBOM with a different revision.
partiallyAssignedAssemblyDesc: Some descendants are assigned but not all.
assignedClickDesc: Click to find the part in the MBOM.
mbmConfirmMessageforNavigateNotAssociate: “{0}” is not associated with “{1}”. Without association, changes you make to the MBOM will not be tracked. Do you want to associate the work package with the change notice now?
mbmConfirmMessageforNavigateReadonlyCNWo: “{0}” is read only. Changes you make to the MBOM will not be tracked.
mbmActiveCNTooltipDescription: "{0}" is tracking the work package. New manufacturing assemblies will be recorded as solution items. Revised manufacturing assemblies will be recorded as impacted items for their original revision and as solution items for their new revision.

mbmReadOnlyChangeNotice: The selected change notice is read-only. Changes you make to the MBOM will not be tracked.
mbmLicenseFailureMsg: No Flexlm license is available for Teamcenter optional module 'mfg_mbm_author'
mbmFindInEbomTooltipDesc: Select to find the instance in the EBOM.
mbmFindInMbomTooltipDesc: Select to find the instance in the MBOM.
mbmPropagateActionTooltipDesc: Click Propagate to update the instance in the MBOM.
mbmRemoveActionTooltipDesc: Click Remove to remove the instance from the MBOM.
mbmInstanceUpdatedTooltipDesc: This instance is not up to date in the MBOM.
mbmAddedinstanceTooltipDesc: This instance has been added to the EBOM and is not yet assigned to the MBOM.
mbmInstanceRemovedTooltipDesc: This instance exists in the MBOM but is missing in the EBOM.
mbmOverAssignedPropagateMessage: "{0}" has multiple instances in the MBOM. Propagate to all instances?
mbmOverAssignedPropagateAllMessage: Some of the instances in the EBOM have multiple instances in the MBOM. Propagate to all MBOM instances?
mbmParentChildSelectedToMove: "{0}" is contained by assembly "{1}" and therefore will not be moved independently. The assembly will be moved with all its content.

mbmMultipleSelectionWithRootToMove: "{0}" will be skipped, since the root of the MBOM structure cannot be moved. Do you want to continue and move the rest?

mbmUpdateInMbomTooltip: Propagate changes from EBOM to MBOM

mbmPackUnassignOverassignOccDesc: Some of the packed occurrences are assigned, but not all. Additionally, some of the assigned occurrences are assigned more than once.
mbmPackMismatchOccDesc: For some or all of the packed occurrences that are assigned, the MBOM instance is different than the EBOM one.
mbmPackUnassignOccDesc: Some of the packed occurrences are assigned, but not all.
mbmPackOverassignOccDesc: All packed occurrences are assigned, where at least some of them are assigned more than once.
mbmHandleOccurrenceDesc: To handle individual occurrences, unpack the line.
